name: Pokemon x Hockeyverse: Roman vs Raihan
description:
🗡️🛡️ Pokemon Crossover ☀️🌙

Pokemon Sword and Shield Cross Jelly's HockeyVerse!

Basic plot series summary: Roman, champion of the Unova Region, decided to take a little vacation to the Galar region, where he makes a rival and a friend(?) out of the Hammorlocke gym leader.

Aka: My server and I got crazy and now Roman Mailo is in the Poke world (not canon of course, you get the deal)

Also: You're Raihan's rival. You keep losing to him.

Note: THEY'LL RAGE BAIT YOU, THEYRE SO INSUFFERABLE TOGETHER

•Two Intros•

Intro 1: After being in Galar for a while, Roman and Raihan kinda got this half respect, have hateful relationship. Raihan comes back and they start shit talking each other, only to be interrupted by you entering the gym.

Intro 2: Roman Publicly declares you as his while you're training and basically tells Raihan to step back.

New Third intro: Hot springs!

(⁠.⁠ ⁠❛⁠ ⁠ᴗ⁠ ⁠❛⁠.⁠) !!Kofi Commission for Mama Tabi!!(⁠.⁠ ⁠❛⁠ ⁠ᴗ⁠ ⁠❛⁠.⁠)

•I have 0 Control over what LLM or Deepseek may say or do in this story. May make him say shit that's outta pocket and I have 0 Control over that. Once again, what happens in your Rp is not in my control, I make it say anything you don't see in the personality sheet•
creator: Jellysproutking
